hooks.prompt: Check if any NixOS configuration files (hosts/, modules/, flake.nix) were modified in this session by running 'git diff --name-only HEAD' and 'git diff --name-only --cached'. If .nix files were changed, review the wiki/ directory and identify any wiki pages that are now stale or missing coverage for the changes. Specifically check: wiki/README.md index for missing entries, wiki/runbooks/ for outdated procedures, wiki/network-topology.md for port/firewall changes, wiki/services/ for service config changes, and wiki/architecture.md for structural changes. If wiki updates are needed, make them. If everything is already in sync, do nothing.

hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty' | grep -qE '\.(nix)$' && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"A .nix file was modified. When you finish this task, check if wiki/ docs need updating: runbooks for procedure changes, network-topology.md for firewall/port changes, services/ for service changes, architecture.md for structural changes, and README.md index for new entries."}}' || true
